engineering.translation: Where one knows that ātyantikam sukham (endless happiness) which is buddhi-grāhyam (graspable by intellect) and atīndriyam (beyond the senses); established (sthitaḥ) in which, one does not waver from tattva (the truth). The verse continues the samādhi-block. Two qualities of the happiness are named: it is grasped by buddhi (a faculty above the senses), and it is itself atīndriyam (beyond sensory mediation). Shankara: the happiness is born of the discriminative knowledge produced by yoga-purified buddhi; reaching it, one is firmly established and does not slip away from the truth of the Self. Ramanuja: the happiness is the experience of the Self's own nature, which the senses cannot supply but the Yoga-purified mind can directly grasp. STRETCHED — the verse names a happiness whose metaphysical scope exceeds operational engineering. The narrowed operational rung: the internal coherence whose ground is not sensory feedback.
engineering.concrete_scenario: A principal engineer has spent a decade studying distributed-systems theory. She knows why CAP is a triangle inequality; she has internalised the consensus-algorithm taxonomy; she understands why exactly-once delivery is impossible without idempotency. One Friday evening, debugging a Kafka consumer-rebalance edge case, the missing piece falls into place — the framework she has been carrying for ten years suddenly rearranges itself, and she sees that the edge case is structurally why the broker design specifies what it specifies. The recognition is not a sensory event. No alert fired; no metric moved; no peer congratulated her. The recognition is grasped internally, by the discriminative faculty trained over a decade. From that moment her conviction about the consensus-design space holds across subsequent disagreements with peers. The internal coherence does not waver under social pressure because its ground is not social. Compare the engineer whose conviction about a system is propped up by the most-recent thread of agreement on Slack — the moment a senior architect questions the design in a meeting, the conviction collapses. The first engineer's certainty is operationally buddhi-grāhya; it does not require sensory or social ratification. The verse reaches further than this; the engineering rung is the recognisable narrow case.
engineering.falsifiability: The analog fails if a reader takes the buddhi-grāhya happiness as merely the satisfaction of solving a hard problem. The verse names a state whose metaphysical scope exceeds anything an engineer's intellectual breakthrough can produce. An engineer who reads 6.21 as 'the joy of solving puzzles' has narrowed the verse beyond recognition.
engineering.counter_example: When the engineer's apparent unwavering conviction is in fact dogmatism — refusal to update under genuine new evidence, refusal to revise the framework when a counter-example arises — the verse does not name this. The truth that the verse points at is open and self-coherent; the closed-and-rigid certainty is a failure mode of trying to inhabit the verse without the discriminative refinement the chapter has demanded.
engineering.implication: When you find your conviction about a system collapsing under social pressure, the conviction was not yet buddhi-grāhya. Where the conviction holds across pressure because its ground is not external, the operational rung the verse names is approached.
engineering.quotable_line: Conviction held by buddhi does not collapse when the room disagrees.

iterations.mutation: v0 generation: BG 6.21 STRETCHED honestly. Engineering analog scoped downward to internal-coherence-of-conviction not sensory-fed. Shankara (buddhi-purified discriminative knowledge) and Ramanuja (Yoga-purified mind grasping Self's nature) preserved. Tools: Kafka, Slack. Confidence MEDIUM.
